---
name: "\U0001F9F0 New Framework Detection Request"
about: Request detection for a new AI framework relevant to the EU AI Act.
title: "[FRAMEWORK] "
labels: enhancement, framework-detection

---

**What framework should AIBOM detect?**
[e.g. `fastai`, `PyTorch Lightning`]

**What is the typical import statement?**
Please provide the common import statement(s) used for this framework.
```python
# e.g. import fastai
# e.g. from pytorch_lightning import Trainer
```

**Link to PyPI page or official documentation**
[e.g. https://pypi.org/project/fastai/]

**Why is this framework relevant for EU AI Act documentation?**
A brief explanation of why this framework is used to build AI systems and should be included in the AIBOM inventory.
